resonant_tap.name: Resonant Tap
resonant_tap.description: Strike with a light harmonic tap that builds a small resonance stack.

echo_flicker.name: Echo Flicker
echo_flicker.description: Deliver a flickering after-image strike that may repeat once through harmonic drift.

harmonic_thread.name: Harmonic Thread
harmonic_thread.description: Send a vibrating thread through the target’s pattern, distorting their accuracy.

feedback_bloom.name: Feedback Bloom
feedback_bloom.description: Bloom with resonant feedback, enhancing clarity and increasing resonance buildup.

oscillation_burst.name: Oscillation Burst
oscillation_burst.description: Unleash a rhythmic oscillation of strikes that hit in rapid succession.

phase_echo.name: Phase Echo
phase_echo.description: Manifest a semi-illusory echo-clone that absorbs part of incoming damage.

resonance_break.name: Resonance Break
resonance_break.description: Snap the air with a sharp harmonic break that may stagger the target.

loop_echo.name: Loop Echo
loop_echo.description: Create a looping echo that repeats the strike after a recursive interval.

harmonic_collapse.name: Harmonic Collapse
harmonic_collapse.description: Collapse built-up resonance into a devastating harmonic release.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Echo technique reserved for future awakening.
